labels.notes: Heike 1:57 — caregiver-stress counselling. SOAP correct, diagnostic code 309 (adjustment reaction) correct, billing K013A counselling correct. Procedure section hallucinated: 'Reviewed previous breast imaging results from March' cites 'I think we did the the breast imaging in March. I got the um' — that is a HISTORICAL discussion of past imaging, not a procedure performed today. Same SOAP-procedure-hallucination failure mode as Kaden/Cathy/Tammy/Jim. Did not cascade into billing here (K013A is the right code regardless).
